name: Papa's Cupcakeria
author: Poki
description: Papa's Cupcakeria has opened in the picturesque town of Frostfield, and you're in charge of baking and decorating cupcakes in the shop! Work your way through all of the holidays of the year, and master all four stations of the restaurant to become a cupcake crafting master. How to play Papa's Cupcakeria? Use the mouse to take orders from guests and create their ice cream! Who created Papa's Cupcakeria? Papa's Cupcakeria was created by Flipline Games. Play their other game on Poki: Papa's Pizzeria , Papa's Scooperia and Papa's Freezeria How can I play Papa's Cupcakeria for free? You can play Papa's Cupcakeria for free on Poki. Can I play Papa's Cupcakeria on mobile devices and desktop? Papa's Cupcakeria can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
